title: Maximum Number of Words You Can Type
titleCn: 可以输入的最大单词数

testcases.input: text = "hello world", brokenLetters = "ad" Output: 1 Explanation: We cannot type "world" because the 'd' key is broken.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: We cannot type "world" because the 'd' key is broken.

testcases.input: text = "leet code", brokenLetters = "lt" Output: 1 Explanation: We cannot type "leet" because the 'l' and 't' keys are broken.
testcases.expectedOutput: 1 Explanation: We cannot type "leet" because the 'l' and 't' keys are broken.

testcases.input: text = "leet code", brokenLetters = "e" Output: 0 Explanation: We cannot type either word because the 'e' key is broken.
testcases.expectedOutput: 0 Explanation: We cannot type either word because the 'e' key is broken.
